---
title: "Lerngelegenheiten"
subtitle: "Webseite für Lerngelegenheiten"
format: html
listing:
  categories: true
  type: table
  contents: 
    - "learning_analytics/*.qmd"
    - "math_summative_praes/*qmd"
    - "stand_testverfahren/*.qmd"
    - "verstehensorientiert_pruefen/*qmd"
    - "special/gdm_tagung.qmd"
  fields: [title, subtitle, author]
  filter-ui: [title, subtitle, author]
  exclude:
    - filename: "woche*"
    - filename: "excl*"
    - author: "Richard Conrardy"
  page-size: 13
---
